Sovereign Organism

26 AI browser extensions. Open this file from anywhere — USB, download folder, local server. Every link below points to the zip right next to this page. No internet needed.

Sovereign Mind

Download .zip

How to install a downloaded .zip

  1. Download any .zip above (or the all-in-one bundle)
  2. Unzip it (right-click the file, Extract All / Unzip)
  3. Open Chrome and go to chrome://extensions
  4. Turn on Developer mode (toggle in the top-right corner)
  5. Click Load unpacked and pick the unzipped folder
  6. Done — the extension is live and running

Same steps for Edge (edge://extensions) and Brave (brave://extensions).

Sovereign Organism — All of it is AI. All of it is downloadable. No internet required.
